title: Headbutt
description:
Deal 9 damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Deal 12 damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
notes: Allows the player to select a card from the Discard Pile and place it on top of the Draw Pile during play.
